data.title: TRX price may reach $0.36 by Nov 2025, despite current caution at $0.34. Bullish trend indicates 7% potential rise.
data.description: Speculation on the future performance of TRX suggests a potential increase of 7% reaching a target price of $0.36 by November 2025. However, a bearish MACD momentum at the current price of $0.34 advises careful consideration before making any investment decisions.

data.title: Peter Thiel advises Elon Musk to reconsider donation pledge, warns against giving wealth to Bill Gates due to fear of Antichrist. Thiel expressed concerns about global Antichrist figure in recent lectures in San Francisco. Thiel, a billionaire venture capitalist, is known for early investments in companies like Facebook.
data.description: Billionaire venture capitalist Peter Thiel has advised Elon Musk to rethink quitting the Giving Pledge, a commitment to donate the majority of their wealth to charity. Thiel expressed concerns about the potential rise of an "Antichrist" figure on the global stage during lectures in San Francisco last month. He fears this figure could establish a one-world government under false promises like preventing nuclear, AI, or climate disasters. Thiel, known for his support of VP JD Vance and early backing of President Donald Trump, is a renowned technology investor who made early investments in Facebook, now known as Meta. You can find the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Hancock Whitney likely to report higher Q3 earnings, project $1.43 EPS (up from $1.33 last year) and revenue of $391.24M (up from $370.35M). Stock fell 1.7%.
data.description: Hancock Whitney Corporation (NYSE: HWC) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings after the market closes on Tuesday, October 14th. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.43 per share, showing an increase from $1.33 per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is estimated to be around $391.24 million, compared to $370.35 million in the previous year. In the second quarter, the company surpassed expectations. Despite this, Hancock Whitney's shares closed down 1.7% at $61.76 on Thursday. For more detailed information, including analyst ratings and insights, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.

data.title: Saudi Arabia's electric kitchen appliances market valued at USD 523.45M in 2024, forecasted to reach USD 641.01M by 2030, growing at 3.43% CAGR due to factors like rising disposable income, urbanization, and lifestyle changes under Vision 2030.
data.description: A report on the Saudi Arabia Electric Kitchen Appliances Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. In 2024, the market was valued at USD 523.45 million and is estimated to reach USD 641.01 million by 2030, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.43%. The market's expansion is attributed to factors such as increasing disposable income, fast urbanization, and the trend towards faster lifestyles.

data.title: Prashant Kalia from Flutterwave highlights crypto compliance challenges and the role of Chainalysis in the industry. #Blockchain #Compliance
data.description: Prashant Kalia, the Chief Risk and Compliance Officer at Flutterwave, has provided valuable insights into the world of crypto compliance in a recent interview. Kalia discussed the importance of platforms like Chainalysis in ensuring regulatory compliance within the industry. He also shed light on the various obstacles encountered in establishing a robust compliance framework. This discussion sheds light on the crucial issues facing companies in the crypto space as they navigate the complex landscape of regulations.

data.title: Litecoin price soars 12.6% to $132.89, near 52-week peak, aiming for $150 target. RSI high at 73.86. Bulls target $133.79 resistance.
data.description: The price of Litecoin jumps by 12.6% to reach $132.89, coming close to its highest point in the past 52 weeks. Bulls are keeping a close eye on the key resistance level at $133.79 for further market movement.

data.title: Town of Dover partners with Claro to deploy AI surveillance tech in municipal buildings improving public safety.
data.description: In Dover, New Jersey, on October 10, 2025, the Town of Dover announced a new collaboration with Claro to implement cutting-edge AI-powered surveillance systems in its municipal buildings. This innovative venture aims to bolster security measures and improve operational efficiency within the town.

data.title: NextNav Inc. advances its 5G PRS-based 3D PNT solution commercialization, reaching a major milestone with standard 5G network equipment. #NextNav #PRS #5G
data.description: RESTON, Virginia-- NextNav Inc. (Nasdaq: NN), known for its advanced terrestrial positioning, navigation, and timing (PNT) and 3D geolocation solutions, shared significant progress today. The company has achieved a breakthrough in commercializing its NextGen PNT solution by running it on standard 5G network equipment. This advancement is pivotal in moving closer to launching a wide-scale commercial 5G-enabled 3D PNT solution. The new developments will be showcased at MWC Las Vegas next week.

data.title: Willdan Group to release Q3 2025 results on Nov 6, 2025, after market close. Investor conference call at 5:30 pm EST. Webcast available.
data.description: Willdan Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: WLDN) based in Anaheim, California, has scheduled the release of its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 after the stock market closes on Thursday, November 6, 2025. The company will then conduct its investor conference call at 5:30 p.m. EST / 2:30 p.m. PST following the release. An online live audio webcast of the quarterly investor conference call can be accessed on Willdan's website.

data.title: Pritikin Longevity Center celebrates 50 years with proven results and looks ahead 50 years to future of longevity.
data.description: In Miami, on October 10, 2025, the Pritikin Longevity Center will be hosting a two-week anniversary celebration to honor its 50 years of success. The center, known for its physician-led lifestyle transformation programs, has been a pioneer in promoting health and wellness. This event will highlight the accomplishments of the past five decades and also look ahead to the future of longevity. As the gold standard in this field, Pritikin has helped countless individuals achieve better health through its proven methods. As the center reflects on its history and impact, it aims to continue leading the way in promoting healthy living for the next 50 years and beyond.

data.title: Propel People & iHire team up, connecting AI platform with iHire's 26-year network for faster access to quality candidates.
data.description: The recent integration links Propel People's AI-driven hiring platform with iHire's 26-year specialized network, enabling contractors to reach top candidates more efficiently. This collaboration, established on October 10, 2025, in Westfield Center, Ohio, enhances access to quality talents through Propel People's advanced technology and iHire's long-standing industry focus.

data.title: Ambulatory Services Market valued at USD 185.4B in 2025, projected to reach USD 290.2B by 2032 with 6.5% CAGR growth.
data.description: The Ambulatory Services Market is estimated to be valued at USD 185.4 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 290.2 billion by 2032, with a compound annual growth rate of 6.5% during this period. Ambulatory care includes outpatient medical services such as physician clinics, medical laboratories, and home healthcare. The outpatient surgery segment is expected to dominate the market, accounting for over two-fifths of the market share in 2025. Hospital-owned ambulatory centers are forecasted to hold over 45% of the global market share by 2025. North America is projected to represent 38% of the market share in 2025, while Asia Pacific is expected to emerge as a lucrative region for ambulatory service providers. The shift towards outpatient care, owing to lower costs and same-day discharge benefits, is driving market growth. However, high infrastructure costs and reimbursement challenges may hinder market expansion.
